abort.invalid_discovery: Home Assistant found an HA TV PiP receiver, but the discovery data was incomplete.

error.already_paired: This receiver is already paired. Use Reset Pairing on the TV app, then try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Android TV receiver.
error.invalid_client: The receiver rejected this Home Assistant pairing session.
error.invalid_code: Enter the six-digit pairing code shown on the TV.
error.invalid_host: Enter the Android TV receiver IP address or hostname.
error.invalid_port: Enter a valid port between 1 and 65535.
error.pairing_not_started: Start pairing again and enter the new code shown on the TV.

confirm.description: Home Assistant discovered {name} at {host}:{port}. Add this Android TV receiver?
confirm.title: Add discovered HA TV PiP receiver

pair.description: Enter the six-digit pairing code shown on {name}. The receiver is at {host}:{port}.
pair.title: Pair HA TV PiP receiver

user.description: Use manual setup if Home Assistant has not discovered the Android TV receiver automatically.
user.title: Add HA TV PiP receiver
